steps.title: Use the fossil location goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate where the dicraeosaurid fossil was found. The relevant note gives the location as the Thar Desert in western India.

steps.title: Remove nonlocation details
steps.content: Choice B describes the fossil's significance as the oldest recovered from its group. Choice C gives information about Dr. Ravi Menon and his affiliation. Choice D gives the fossil's age and dinosaur group. The answer is A.
